name: Sienna Misted Mug
summary: Wheel-thrown stoneware mug with a warm sand glaze.
description: Crafted in small batches, this mug holds a generous pour while staying light in hand. The matte glaze keeps each piece visually soft, with slight variation that makes every mug unique.

name: Zenith Planter
summary: Rounded tabletop planter with a breathable ceramic body.
description: Designed for modern shelves and window nooks, the Zenith Planter balances proportion and function with a drainage-ready inner chamber and neutral finish.

name: Orbital Sculpture Vase
summary: Sculptural vase built around soft geometry.
description: A conversational centerpiece for dining tables and consoles. The Orbital vase is hand-finished to preserve subtle texture across each contour.

name: Tide Serving Bowl
summary: Wide serving bowl with a satin interior glaze.
description: Made for shared meals, the Tide bowl blends everyday durability with a gallery-inspired profile. Suitable for fruit, salads, and table styling.

name: Cliff Candle Holder
summary: Compact taper holder with textured ridges.
description: The Cliff holder adds warmth to evening tablescapes. Its ribbed silhouette catches ambient light and creates a soft shadow play.

name: Harbor Espresso Cup
summary: Small espresso cup with handcrafted lip detail.
description: A tactile daily ritual piece for espresso lovers. The Harbor cup is fired at high temperature for strength and finished with a quiet earth-tone glaze.

name: Solace Arch Vase
summary: Architectural arch form for tall stems.
description: The Solace vase bridges sculpture and utility with an elongated profile, perfect for dried branches, seasonal botanicals, or minimalist arrangements.

name: Grove Salad Plate
summary: Flat-rim ceramic plate for daily layering.
description: Designed to stack cleanly and age beautifully, the Grove plate suits both everyday lunches and weekend hosting.
